author: Xbox YouTube
text:
DEAD OR ALIVE 6 Last Round Launch Trailer
Intense Fighting Entertainment is back! DEAD OR ALIVE 6 Last Round is available TODAY for purchase and free-to-play!

Play as 29 unique characters, with 5 fan-favorite DOA heroines getting brand-new costumes. Stage and snap pictures in the new Photo Mode, and get a brand-new look at iconic locations with the new OBORO lighting system.

A new original character, Minato, joins the fray later this Summer! Stay tuned for more information!

https://www.xbox.com/games/store/dead-or-alive-6-last-round/9P63MRFX8PL6

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Abyssus - XBOX and Game Pass Release Trailer
Play Abyssus, the brinepunk roguelike co-op FPS, available now on XBOX Series X|S and Game Pass, with full crossplay across all platforms!

https://www.xbox.com/games/store/abyssus/9P8NKVVB0XQJ

With the free 1.3 content update, XBOX and Game Pass players can now descend into the depths with seamless, full cross-platform multiplayer support. No matter your platform of choice, team up in 1–4 player online co-op and conquer the abyss together.

Launching alongside the console release is the free 1.3 content update, expanding Abyssus with a brand-new God, new blessings, a new area filled with fresh enemies and challenges, additional room objectives, and gameplay improvements, including matchmaking enhancements.

Set in a unique brinepunk universe, Abyssus blends intense first-person shooter combat with roguelike progression systems, powerful weapon upgrades, and synergic blessings that make every run different. Designed for cooperative play, the game emphasizes team synergy, build experimentation, and high-risk, high-reward combat encounters beneath the ocean’s surface.

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Sandustry - Release Date Announcement Trailer
Sandustry is coming to Xbox on PC and PC Game Pass on August 13th!

Explore and mine fully destructible worlds. Automate increasingly complex production chains. Delve deep to uncover an ancient civilization’s powerful secrets and learn to love the sand in this factory game where every pixel is a valuable resource.

https://www.xbox.com/games/store/sandustry-game-preview/9PPH71DV44T7
